question: What are the realistic financial scenarios for Xinpinmu, and how should investors think about its impact on PDD's valuation?

findings.claim: PDD Holdings FY2025: revenue RMB 431.8B (+10% YoY), net income RMB 99.4B (-11.6% YoY), gross margin 60.9%, operating margin 27.5%, net margin 28.5%, with RMB 422.3B cash/equivalents/short-term investments
findings.data: FY2025 revenue: RMB 431,845.7M (+10% YoY). Q4 revenue: RMB 123,912.2M (+12% YoY). Q4 non-GAAP operating profit: RMB 29,474.1M. FY2025 net income: RMB 99.36B (-11.62% YoY). Gross margin: 60.9%. Operating margin: 27.5%. Net margin: 28.5%. Cash/equivalents/ST investments: RMB 422.3B (Dec 31, 2025). Operating cash flow TTM: $16.7B. Capex TTM: -$135.85M. Free cash flow: $16.15B. FY2025 total cost of revenues +23% YoY.

findings.claim: PDD trades at ~9.4x forward P/E with market cap ~$145B, enterprise value ~$85B after netting ~$58B cash, meaning ~40% of market cap is cash; this is among the cheapest large-cap e-commerce valuations globally
findings.data: Market cap: $144.76B. Enterprise value: $84.3-86.7B. Cash: $59.52B, debt: $1.5B, net cash: $58.03B ($40.87/share). Net cash = ~40% of market cap. Forward P/E: 9.4x. Trailing P/E: 9.7x. Earnings yield: double-digit. Free cash flow: $16.15B TTM. Stock trading ~$98-107 range around earnings (March 2026).

findings.claim: PDD does not break out Pinduoduo vs Temu profitability, making traditional SOTP analysis difficult; revenue is reported only as Online Marketing Services (advertising) and Transaction Services (fulfillment/processing fees)
findings.data: PDD does not disclose segment-level profitability for Pinduoduo domestic vs Temu international. Revenue categories: Online Marketing Services (merchant advertising) and Transaction Services (Temu fulfillment/processing + Duo Duo Grocery). No publicly available analyst report with rigorous SOTP breakout separating Pinduoduo and Temu. Analysts like DBS and Morningstar value on consolidated basis using blended P/E multiples. Huatai used SOTP but methodology not disclosed in search results.
